use_cases: Visualizing categorical data distributions across multiple groups with stacked segments
Displaying security threat analysis by category and severity level
Comparing proportional breakdowns across different metrics in dashboards
Rendering analytics data with animated bar chart transitions
Showing multi-series data comparisons in a single unified visualization
ai_summary: A reaviz-powered stacked bar chart component for displaying categorical data with multiple series breakdowns. Uses framer-motion for animations and displays security-themed data (threat types with severity levels) in a flat, professional visual style. Ideal for SaaS dashboards and analytics platforms requiring data visualization of proportional distributions.
